title: ceanothus integerrimus var. puberulus
intro: Ceanothus integerrimus var. puberulus, also known as roughleaf ceanothus or mountain whitethorn, is a shrub native to the western United States and Canada. This plant contains compounds with anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been traditionally used in medicine to treat various health issues. The medicinal properties of Ceanothus integerrimus var. puberulus have been linked to its potential in reducing inflammation, soothing digestive issues, and promoting wound healing, among other health benefits. In herbal preparations, Ceanothus integerrimus var. puberulus is often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, as well as being incorporated into salves and creams for topical application.
